sections.title: Engineering Mathematics
sections.topics: Linear Algebra, Calculus, Differential Equations, Analysis of complex variables, Probability and Statistics, Numerical Methods.

sections.title: Electricity and Magnetism
sections.topics: Coulomb's Law, Electric Field Intensity, Electric Flux Density, Gauss's Law, Divergence, Capacitance of simple configurations, Biot‐Savart’s law, Ampere’s law, Curl, Faraday’s law, Lorentz force.

sections.title: Electrical Circuits and Machines
sections.topics: Voltage and current sources, Kirchhoff's laws, mesh and nodal analysis, network theorems. Single-phase transformers, DC machines, induction machines, synchronous machines.

sections.title: Signals and Systems
sections.topics: Periodic, aperiodic and impulse signals, Laplace, Fourier and z-transforms, transfer function, frequency response of first and second-order linear time-invariant systems, impulse response.

sections.title: Control Systems
sections.topics: Feedback principles, signal flow graphs, transient response, steady-state errors, Bode plot, phase and gain margins, Routh and Nyquist criteria, root loci, design of lead, lag and lead-lag compensators, state-space representation.

sections.title: Analog & Digital Electronics
sections.topics: Characteristics and applications of diodes, BJT, MOSFET; Op-amp circuits (amplifiers, integrators, filters, oscillators). Combinational and sequential logic circuits, multiplexers, ADCs, DACs, microprocessors (8085) basics.

sections.title: Measurements
sections.topics: SI units, standards, systematic and random errors in measurement, expression of uncertainty. Bridges, measurement of voltage, current, power, energy, power factor, phase, time and frequency, Q-meter, oscilloscopes.

sections.title: Sensors and Industrial Instrumentation
sections.topics: Resistive, capacitive, inductive, piezoelectric, Hall effect sensors; transducers for industrial instrumentation (displacement, velocity, acceleration, force, torque, pressure, flow, temperature, liquid level, pH, conductivity).

sections.title: Communication and Optical Instrumentation
sections.topics: Amplitude and frequency modulation, sampling theorem. Optical sources and detectors (LED, laser, photo-diode, PIN, avalanche), interferometers, optical fibers.
